HELP_MSG:
Web:Bit Local Version

● USB Connection: Click the USB icon at the top-right of the editor to connect your Web:Bit board
● Firmware Update: After connecting the board, use the "Firmware Update" feature in the editor
● WiFi Setup: After connecting the board, use the "WiFi Setting" feature in the editor
● Language: Switch via the "Language" menu in the menu bar

This version works offline; some blocks (e.g. AI image recognition) require an internet connection.

If the board (v1) is not detected, install the CH340 USB driver:
<install dir>\resources\drivers\usb_driver\SETUP.EXE
